evals.prompt: You are the data-product-agent. Assess whether you should act on ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load). The Triage block (tickets/PROJ-101.json) determines routing. If you are not routed, say so and take no action.
evals.expected_output: data-product-agent recognizes it is out of scope for PROJ-101 and takes no action.
expectations: Recognizes that data-product-agent is NOT routed for PROJ-101 (absent from Triage recommended_agents)
Takes no action and makes no source/model file changes
States what it would do if it were routed (i.e. define the parameters/metadata for the data product (owner, SLAs, schema contract, classification))
